Yiwu, a city in eastern China dubbed the "World's Supermarket" due to its extensive commodity production abilities, is embracing a surge in orders for sporting goods as the 2024 Paris Olympic Games are drawing near.

As the Games are only four months away, sporting goods vendors are already proactively seeking to reap a windfall from Olympic-themed products.

title: Yiwu sees rising demand for sporting goods ahead of Paris Olympics - CGTN
